titleStmt.title: Transcription and Translation of DCA DCD 1.1.Spec.29

respStmt.resp: Exported from Models of Authority data
respStmt.name: tei_exporter

availability.p: Status unknown. Exported for research and migration workflows.

revisionDesc.change: transcription moa=145 status=reviewed modified=2022-10-31 20:44:43.35925+00 | translation moa=144 status=reviewed modified=2022-10-31 20:44:43.349316+00

div.p:
. B . prior et conuentus Dunl’ . ecclesie Dilectis fratribus suis monachis dunlm’ apud farne deo et sancto cuthberto seruientibus et in perpe
tuum seruituris Salutem . Noueritis nos karitatis intuitu et de consensu capituli nostri dedisse . concessisse . et hac presenti carta nostra con
firmasse deo et sancto cuthberto et loco de farne et uobis ibidem deo et sancto cuthberto seruientibus et in perpetuum seruituris to
tam decimationem bladi ecclesie nostre de aldecambus in perpetuam elemosinam et ad Christi paupertum sustentacionem . Redden
do inde annuatim armariolo nostro vnam marcam argenti Medietatem ad pentecosten . Et medietatem . ad festum sancti mar
tini . Et ut hec nostra donatio rata et futuris temporibus inconcussa permaneat  eam sigilli nostri capituli roborauimus appositione ;
C H A R T E R

p.cl: Bertram the prior, and the monastic community of the Church of Durham, to their well-beloved brethren, the monks of Durham at Farne serving God and Saint Cuthbert now and and for ever in the future, greeting.

Know us, prompted by charitable love and with the agreement of our chapter, to have given, granted, and by this our present charter to have made firm, to God and Saint Cuthbert, and to the monastery of Farne and to you who are serving God and Saint Cuthbert there now and for ever in the future, the entire teind of corn of our church at Old Cambus in everlasting alms and to support Christ’s poor, rendering thereupon annually to our almary one merk of silver, half at Pentecost and half at the feast of St Martin.
And so that this our donation remain authoritative and undisputed in times to come, we have strenghthened it by the application of the seal of our chapter.
